_meta.warning: This is a CONCEPTUAL capability profile for a proof-of-concept. Availability values are WORKING ASSUMPTIONS, not verified facts. Every real-world clinical/logistical specific is flagged with [TO VERIFY] in its notes and must be confirmed against a local source before use.
_meta.spec_source: docs/SPEC.md v0.1 section c (Geography & care-tier model).
_meta.structure_note: Follows the SPEC.md section c table structure (capability_id, description, local_available, tertiary_available, notes) and adds a 'category' field grouping capabilities into labs_diagnostics, medications, procedures, specialist_availability as directed by the Step 2 task.

local.name: Local — Sihor Community Health Centre / small private hospitals
local.description: First-contact and ongoing primary care close to the patient's home. Conceptually supports basic tests, common medications, monitoring, and routine pre-operative optimization; conceptually cannot perform cardiac surgery or provide advanced cardiac intervention/critical care. [TO VERIFY — actual Sihor CHC and small private hospital capabilities against a local source].

tertiary.name: Tertiary — Bhavnagar
tertiary.description: Advanced hospital care ~20-25 km away. Conceptually can perform CABG and provide advanced cardiac diagnostics, intervention, and peri-operative critical care; conceptually not the site for continuous day-to-day local optimization. [TO VERIFY — actual Bhavnagar tertiary capabilities and distance against a local source].
